creator: rmatteoda

evidence.text: Prompt Evaluation Service - Light version # PromptEvalLight **A lightweight Elixir service for prompt evaluation and text analysis, showcasing OTP patterns and concurrent processing.** PromptEvalLight is an educational and production-ready service that demonstrates advanced OTP (Open Telecom Platform) patterns while providing comprehensive text evaluation capabilities. Built with fault tolerance, scalability, and observability in mind. ## 🎯 Features ### Core Evaluation Metrics - **ROUGE Metrics**: ROUGE-1 and ROUGE-L for text similarity analysis - **Text Quality**: Coherence scoring and readability assessment -
